/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/firestaff_m11_wall_collision_capture_probe.dir/probes/m11/firestaff_m11_wall_collision_capture_probe.c.o -o firestaff_m11_wall_collision_capture_probe  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libfirestaff_m12.a libfirestaff_m11.a libfirestaff_m12.a libfirestaff_m11.a libfirestaff_m10.a /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so.0.2.24 -lm
